$schema_note: Generated by hooks/macros.py from docs/_data/*.yaml. Edit YAML files, not this JSON.

ktor.label: Ktor
ktor.runner:
ktor(
  runner = { params -> {pkg}.run(params, wait = false) },
  withParameters = listOf("server.port=8080")
)

spring-boot.label: Spring Boot

container.label: Docker image (container mode)
container.runner:
containerApp(
  image = "ghcr.io/your-org/your-app:latest",
  target = ContainerTarget.Server(
    hostPort = 8080,
    internalPort = 8080,
    portEnvVar = "PORT",
    readiness = ReadinessStrategy.HttpGet(url = "http://localhost:8080/health")
  )
)

go.label: Go binary (goApp)
go.runner:
goApp(
  binaryPath = System.getProperty("go.app.binary")
    ?: error("go.app.binary system property not set"),
  target = ProcessTarget.Server(
    port = 8080,
    portEnvVar = "PORT",
    readiness = ReadinessStrategy.HttpGet(url = "http://localhost:8080/health")
  )
)

process.label: Host binary (process mode)

junit.label: JUnit 5

kotest.label: Kotest (recommended)
